title: dryopteris fraterna
intro: Dryopteris fraterna, also known as the Autumn fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris fraterna include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health and immune system function. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris fraterna include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
